title: panicum lindheimeri var. tennesseense
intro: Panicum lindheimeri var. tennesseense, also known as Big Muhly, is a perennial grass native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Panicum lindheimeri var. tennesseense include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, and it is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
